##LOCALITY=Mawi area, Nuristan, Laghman Province, Afghanistan
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Herb Obodda
##DESCRIPTION=Orange brown prismatic crystal
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
